title: 3/8" Impact Socket Extension Bar Set 3PC Drive Extension Bar 75 mm 150 mm 250 mm CR-V Steel Wrench Extender for Manual Pneumatic Torque Wrench
features: Excellent quality: The socket extension bar set is made of high quality chrome vanadium steel, durable, not easy to rust, longer service life
Spring-loaded ball design: The spring-loaded ball stop on each extension secures the sockets and prevents them from falling out during use

Clearly marked sizes: Color coding ensures that you can quickly find the ones you want. High-contrast, permanent, laser-engraved size markings allow easy identification even in low light conditions, saving time and effort

Wide application: The extension set offers tools for almost any project, including car repairs, DIY and mechanical work. It is compatible with all cordless, electric and pneumatic impact wrenches and is perfect for tasks such as changing tires, engine work and general maintenance work
description: Product Description The socket extension bar set is made of high quality chrome vanadium steel, durable, not easy to rust, longer service life. The spring-loaded ball stop on each extension secures the sockets and prevents them from falling out during use. Color coding ensures that you can quickly find the ones you want. High-contrast, permanent, laser-engraved size markings allow easy identification even in low light conditions, saving time and effort. The extension set offers tools for almost any project, including car repairs, DIY and mechanical work. It is compatible with all cordless, electric and pneumatic impact wrenches and is perfect for tasks such as changing tires, engine work and general maintenance work.
